headline: Coinbase Leads Crypto VC Deals in H1 2026

article.title: Coinbase Ventures tops crypto VC list for H1 2026
article.summary: Coinbase’s venture capital arm leads 2026 crypto investing even as funding withered and unique investors shied away amid the bear market.

article.title: Strategy sells $467M in MSTR shares, leaves 843,775 BTC stack untouched
article.summary: Strategy boosted its US dollar reserve to $3 billion after selling $466.7 million in MSTR shares, while keeping its 843,775 Bitcoin holdings unchanged.

headline: US Stocks Sink 2% on Mideast Oil Spike

article.title: US Stocks Fall as Mideast Tensions Flare Anew, Oil Climbs
article.summary: US stocks dropped on Monday as investors assessed tit-for-tat attacks between the US and Iran and conflicting information over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Tech Stocks Plummet 3% as Oil Surges 5%

article.title: Tech Stocks Slide as Oil Climbs on US-Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A selloff in tech giants sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil jumped after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.

article.title: Strive (ASST) Adds 18 Bitcoin, Pushing Treasury to 19,900 BTC
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strive (ASST) Adds 18 Bitcoin, Pushing Treasury to 19,900 BTC
Strive (ASST) purchased 18 bitcoin for about $1.2 million last week, increasing its treasury to 19,900 BTC while maintaining $154.1 million in cash as it continues integrating its bitcoin-focused treasury strategy.
